About Me

Dedicated to Child Health, Education & Excellence

I am Dr. G S Vairamuthu, a Paediatrician and Child Specialist based in Trichy, Tamil Nadu, holding an MD, Diploma in Child Health (DCH), and a prestigious Post Graduate Program in Nutrition (PGPN) from Boston, USA. With over two decades of clinical and academic experience, I specialize in general paediatrics, pediatric intensive care, and vaccination.

As a faculty member at KAPV Medical College, Trichy, I am deeply committed to postgraduate medical education, mentoring the next generation of clinicians. My research interests include breast milk bioactive components — lactoferrin, secretory IgA, and human milk oligosaccharides — and their role in neonatal immunity and child development.

At VS Hospital, Mathur, I offer comprehensive child healthcare — from routine well-baby visits and vaccinations to advanced critical care for sick children in our Pediatric ICU.

Our Facility

VS Hospital — Mathur, Trichy

About VS Hospital

VS Hospital is a modern, purpose-built paediatric clinic and child health centre located in Annanagar, Mathur, Trichy. Designed with a contemporary architectural aesthetic, the hospital provides a welcoming, child-friendly environment for families from Mathur and surrounding areas.

The facility is equipped for general outpatient consultations, immunization services, well-baby clinics, and pediatric emergency care — all under the direct supervision of Dr. G S Vairamuthu.

What We Treat

Clinical Specialties

👶

General Paediatrics

Comprehensive care for infants, children, and adolescents — fever, infections, growth monitoring, developmental assessment, and chronic childhood illness management.

🩺

Pediatric Intensive Care (PICU)

Advanced critical care for seriously ill children — respiratory failure, sepsis, multi-organ dysfunction, post-operative monitoring, and emergency stabilization.

💉

Vaccination & Immunization

Complete IAP and national immunization schedule vaccines, travel vaccines, catch-up schedules, and counselling on vaccine-preventable diseases for all age groups.

🭌

Neonatal Care

Care of newborns including neonatal jaundice, feeding support, neonatal infections, and lactation counselling with expert guidance on breast milk nutrition.

🌿

Child Nutrition & Growth

Evidence-based nutrition assessment, failure to thrive management, obesity counselling, micronutrient deficiency treatment, and dietary planning — backed by PGPN Boston training.

🧠

Developmental Paediatrics

Screening and guidance for developmental delays, speech and language milestones, learning difficulties, ADHD, autism spectrum assessment, and early intervention referrals.

Academic Role

KAPV Medical College, Trichy

As a faculty physician at KAPV Medical College, Trichy, I contribute to undergraduate and postgraduate medical education in paediatrics and clinical medicine. My teaching integrates real-world PICU experiences with evidence-based protocols to prepare residents for complex clinical scenarios.

My Boston PGPN training enriches my academic contribution, particularly in neonatal and paediatric nutrition — an area I actively incorporate into PG curricula, case discussions, and research mentorship.

  • PG Teaching — Paediatrics & Clinical Medicine
  • Dissertation guidance & research mentorship
  • Breast milk bioactive components research
  • Case-based PICU teaching for residents
  • Rational pharmacotherapy for children
  • Journal club & critical appraisal sessions
